new_value: All 44 Serial.printf calls migrated across 18 files. Clean compile. Commit 128f318.
Fixed: replaced em-dash with ASCII hyphen since Montserrat doesn't include the glyph
Fixed: all screens bumped to montserrat_16/20 minimum. Weather, calendar, status bar, home screen all pass desk-distance readability.

Fixed: WeatherIcon canvas renders actual weather graphics (sun, clouds, rain, etc.) from OWM codes. Hourly tiles show 'Clear'/'Rain'/etc. instead of raw codes. Per-canvas PSRAM buffers prevent home/weather screen corruption. Nav bar uses LV_SYMBOL_IMAGE (valid, no better LVGL built-in alternative).
